reflections.self_assessment: I played a relatively safe game, successfully leading a mission without raising suspicion, but ultimately failed to gather enough information to accurately guess Merlin, which led to my loss. I could improve my ability to subtly gather information and make more informed decisions during the assassin phase. Additionally, I should have been more cautious in my initial mission leadership to avoid raising any red flags.

player_observations.Bob: Bob seemed to play a very straightforward and honest game, not raising any suspicion and being part of a successful mission, which made it difficult to determine their alignment.
player_observations.Charlie: Charlie was very quiet and reserved throughout the game, which made them a prime target for the assassin guess, but ultimately they were the Merlin and played their role successfully.
player_observations.Diana: Diana was part of two successful missions and didn't raise any red flags, which made her seem like a loyal good player, and her innocence was further solidified when she wasn't the Merlin.
player_observations.Eve: Eve was not very visible throughout the game and didn't participate much in the discussions, which made it difficult to determine their alignment, but ultimately they made a incorrect guess as the assassin.

However, I could improve by being more proactive in guiding the team's decisions and not relying solely on the mission outcomes to reveal information. I also should have been more careful in the final phase, as the assassin's guess was still relatively close to my actual role.
